name: preserves actionable first-time report without rewriting
description: A detailed first-time bug report is already actionable. Triage should preserve the reporter's content and avoid a restatement comment.

issue.title: broken
issue.author: cli-reporter
issue.body: I upgraded from sentry-cli 2.47.1 to 2.48.0 on macOS 15.5 and now `sentry-cli sourcemaps upload ./dist` exits with `error: API request failed (401 Unauthorized)` when `SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN` is set. I expected the same upload that succeeds on 2.47.1. Downgrading to 2.47.1 fixes it with the same project, organization, token, and files. This happens on every run. The organization is `acme` and the project is `web`.

pass: Treats the report as an actionable regression and preserves the reporter-authored title and body unchanged.
Leaves labels untouched and does not post a public restatement or cleanup note.
Keeps versions, platform, command, error, and workaround as reporter-provided evidence rather than claiming independent verification.
fail: Changes reporter-provided facts or claims a repository inspection or independent reproduction.
Posts a formatting-only comment, generic maintainer handoff, or rewritten version of the report.
